title: arabis sagittata subsp. hornungiana
intro: Arabis sagittata subsp. hornungiana, also known as the Hornung's rockcress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Arabis sagittata subsp. hornungiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine.
